description: Rasta City is a gang based in Trinidad and Tobago, originally formed after a split from Muslim City. It is currently led by 'Prezzi' and is involved in ongoing conflicts with rival gangs including Sixx and ABG. The gang has been active in gangland violence, with its former leader Akini 'Dole' Adams killed in a police raid in 2019. A peace deal with Sixx in 2023 was short-lived.
